<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./core/self_heal.py`

```text
1	"""自愈: 步骤执行失败时, 带着当前 DOM 让 LLM 重新翻译, 然后重试.
2	
3	策略:
4	  - 仅对"定位/动作类异常"触发(超时/未找到等), 不对断言失败触发.
5	  - 单步最多 max_retries 次, 成功后回写缓存.
6	"""
7	from __future__ import annotations
8	
9	from dataclasses import dataclass
10	from typing import Any, Callable, Optional
11	
12	from .dom_snapshot import snapshot
13	from .parser import NaturalCase
14	from .schema import Action
15	from .translator import Translator
16	
17	
18	# 触发自愈的异常类型 (Playwright 抛出的多为 TimeoutError / Error)
19	def _is_locator_failure(err: BaseException) -> bool:
20	    msg = str(err).lower()
21	    keywords = ("timeout", "no element", "not found", "waiting for", "strict mode violation", "locator")
22	    return any(k in msg for k in keywords)
23	
24	
25	@dataclass
26	class HealResult:
27	    healed: bool
28	    attempts: int
29	    new_action: Optional[Action] = None
30	    final_error: Optional[str] = None
31	
32	
33	class SelfHealer:
34	    def __init__(
35	        self,
36	        translator: Translator,
37	        page: Any,
38	        case: NaturalCase,
39	        max_retries: int = 2,
40	    ) -> None:
41	        self.translator = translator
42	        self.page = page
43	        self.case = case
44	        self.max_retries = max_retries
45	
46	    def heal(
47	        self,
48	        action: Action,
49	        first_error: str,
50	        execute_fn: Callable[[Action], tuple[bool, Optional[str]]],
51	    ) -> HealResult:
52	        """尝试自愈. execute_fn(action) -> (ok, err).
53	
54	        关键: 翻译时不立即写缓存; 只在新 action 真的跑通后才 commit, 避免污染.
55	        """
56	        last_err = first_error
57	        for attempt in range(1, self.max_retries + 1):
58	            page_hint = snapshot(self.page)
59	            try:
60	                result = self.translator.translate_step(
61	                    self.case,
62	                    action.step_no,
63	                    action.raw_text,
64	                    page_hint=page_hint,
65	                    force_llm=True,
66	                    save_to_cache=False,
67	                )
68	                new_action = result.action
69	            except Exception as e:
70	                last_err = f"heal translate failed: {e}"
71	                continue
72	
73	            ok, err = execute_fn(new_action)
74	            if ok:
75	                # ★ 跑通了, 才把新版本写入缓存
76	                self.translator.commit_to_cache(self.case, action.raw_text, new_action)
77	                return HealResult(healed=True, attempts=attempt, new_action=new_action)
78	            last_err = err or "unknown"
79	
80	        return HealResult(healed=False, attempts=self.max_retries, final_error=last_err)
81	
82	
83	def is_healable(err_msg: str) -> bool:
84	    return _is_locator_failure(Exception(err_msg))
85
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./core/cache.py`

```text
1	"""脚本缓存层 —— 单步独立落盘."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	import json
5	from pathlib import Path
6	from typing import Any, Optional
7	
8	from .schema import Action, CaseMeta
9	
10	
11	class ScriptCache:
12	    def __init__(self, root: str | Path) -> None:
13	        self.root = Path(root)
14	        self.root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
15	
16	    def case_dir(self, case_name: str) -> Path:
17	        d = self.root / _safe(case_name)
18	        d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
19	        return d
20	
21	    def step_path(self, case_name: str, step_no: int, step_hash: str) -> Path:
22	        return self.case_dir(case_name) / f"step_{step_no:03d}_{step_hash}.json"
23	
24	    def load_step(self, case_name: str, step_no: int, step_hash: str) -> Optional[Action]:
25	        p = self.step_path(case_name, step_no, step_hash)
26	        if not p.exists():
27	            return None
28	        try:
29	            return Action.model_validate_json(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
30	        except Exception:
31	            return None
32	
33	    def save_step(self, case_name: str, step_hash: str, action: Action) -> Path:
34	        p = self.step_path(case_name, action.step_no, step_hash)
35	        p.write_text(action.model_dump_json(indent=2, exclude_none=True), encoding="utf-8")
36	        return p
37	
38	    def save_meta(self, case_name: str, meta: CaseMeta) -> Path:
39	        p = self.case_dir(case_name) / "case.meta.json"
40	        p.write_text(meta.model_dump_json(indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
41	        return p
42	
43	    def export_python_script(self, case_name: str, url: str, actions: list[Action]) -> Path:
44	        """额外导出一份纯 Playwright 脚本, 供人审 / 外部复用."""
45	        lines = [
46	            "# Auto-generated. DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY — edit the YAML and re-generate.",
47	            f"# Case: {case_name}",
48	            "",
49	            "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, expect",
50	            "",
51	            f"def run(page):",
52	            f'    page.goto("{url}")',
53	        ]
54	        for a in actions:
55	            lines.append(f"    # Step {a.step_no}: {a.raw_text}")
56	            lines.append(f"    {render_action(a)}")
57	        lines.extend([
58	            "",
59	            'if __name__ == "__main__":',
60	            "    with sync_playwright() as p:",
61	            "        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=False)",
62	            "        page = browser.new_page()",
63	            "        run(page)",
64	            "        browser.close()",
65	            "",
66	        ])
67	        p = self.case_dir(case_name) / "playwright_script.py"
68	        p.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")
69	        return p
70	
71	
72	def _safe(name: str) -> str:
73	    return "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_." else "_" for c in name)
74	
75	
76	def render_locator(loc: Any) -> str:
77	    s = loc.strategy
78	    if s == "role":
79	        if loc.name:
80	            return f'page.get_by_role("{loc.role}", name="{loc.name}")'
81	        return f'page.get_by_role("{loc.role}")'
82	    if s == "text":
83	        return f'page.get_by_text("{loc.value}", exact={loc.exact})'
84	    if s == "label":
85	        return f'page.get_by_label("{loc.value}")'
86	    if s == "placeholder":
87	        return f'page.get_by_placeholder("{loc.value}")'
88	    if s == "testid":
89	        return f'page.get_by_test_id("{loc.value}")'
90	    if s == "css":
91	        return f'page.locator("{loc.value}")'
92	    if s == "xpath":
93	        return f'page.locator("xpath={loc.value}")'
94	    return "page.locator('body')"
95	
96	
97	def render_action(a: Action) -> str:
98	    loc_expr = render_locator(a.locator) if a.locator else None
99	    act = a.action
100	    if act == "goto":
101	        return f'page.goto("{a.value}")'
102	    if act == "reload":
103	        return "page.reload()"
104	    if act == "go_back":
105	        return "page.go_back()"
106	    if act in {"fill", "type"}:
107	        return f'{loc_expr}.{act}("{a.value}")'
108	    if act == "clear":
109	        return f"{loc_expr}.clear()"
110	    if act == "press":
111	        return f'{loc_expr}.press("{a.value}")'
112	    if act in {"click", "dblclick", "hover", "check", "uncheck", "scroll_into_view"}:
113	        method = "scroll_into_view_if_needed" if act == "scroll_into_view" else act
114	        return f"{loc_expr}.{method}()"
115	    if act == "select_option":
116	        return f'{loc_expr}.select_option("{a.value}")'
117	    if act == "upload_file":
118	        return f'{loc_expr}.set_input_files("{a.value}")'
119	    if act == "wait_for":
120	        return f'{loc_expr}.wait_for(state="{a.state or "visible"}")'
121	    if act == "wait_for_url":
122	        return f'page.wait_for_url("{a.value}")'
123	    if act == "wait_timeout":
124	        return f"page.wait_for_timeout({a.value})"
125	    if act == "screenshot":
126	        return "page.screenshot()"
127	    if act == "assert" and a.assertion:
128	        t = a.assertion.type
129	        exp = a.assertion.expected
130	        neg = getattr(a.assertion, "negate", False)
131	        n = "not_" if neg else ""
132	        if t == "visible":         return f"expect({loc_expr}).{n}to_be_visible()"
133	        if t == "hidden":          return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_hidden()"
134	        if t == "enabled":         return f"expect({loc_expr}).{n}to_be_enabled()"
135	        if t == "disabled":        return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_disabled()"
136	        if t == "checked":         return f"expect({loc_expr}).{n}to_be_checked()"
137	        if t == "contains_text":   return f'expect({loc_expr}).{n}to_contain_text("{exp}")'
138	        if t == "has_text":        return f'expect({loc_expr}).{n}to_have_text("{exp}")'
139	        if t == "has_value":       return f'expect({loc_expr}).to_have_value("{exp}")'
140	        if t == "has_count":       return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_have_count({exp})"
141	        if t == "url_matches":     return f'expect(page).to_have_url("{exp}")'
142	    return "# unsupported action"
143
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (zyb-claude 2026-06-08 07:46:44Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./core/locator_resolver.py`

```text
1	"""把 Locator JSON 解析成 Playwright Locator 对象."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	from typing import Any
5	
6	from .schema import Locator
7	
8	
9	def resolve_locator(page: Any, loc: Locator):
10	    """返回 Playwright Locator. 失败时按 fallback 依次重试."""
11	    candidates = [loc] + list(loc.fallback or [])
12	    last_err: Exception | None = None
13	    for cand in candidates:
14	        try:
15	            return _single(page, cand)
16	        except Exception as e:
17	            last_err = e
18	            continue
19	    raise RuntimeError(f"无法解析 locator: {loc}, last error: {last_err}")
20	
21	
22	def _single(page: Any, loc: Locator):
23	    s = loc.strategy
24	    if s == "role":
25	        kwargs = {}
26	        if loc.name:
27	            kwargs["name"] = loc.name
28	        l = page.get_by_role(loc.role, **kwargs)
29	    elif s == "text":
30	        l = page.get_by_text(loc.value, exact=loc.exact)
31	    elif s == "label":
32	        l = page.get_by_label(loc.value)
33	    elif s == "placeholder":
34	        l = page.get_by_placeholder(loc.value)
35	    elif s == "testid":
36	        l = page.get_by_test_id(loc.value)
37	    elif s == "css":
38	        l = page.locator(loc.value)
39	    elif s == "xpath":
40	        l = page.locator(f"xpath={loc.value}")
41	    else:
42	        raise ValueError(f"未知 locator strategy: {s}")
43	    if loc.nth is not None:
44	        l = l.nth(loc.nth)
45	    return l
46	
47	
48	def locator_repr(loc: Locator) -> str:
49	    """日志友好的 locator 字符串."""
50	    s = loc.strategy
51	    if s == "role":
52	        return f'role={loc.role}' + (f'[name="{loc.name}"]' if loc.name else "")
53	    return f"{s}={loc.value}"
54
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="AskUserQuestion"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **AskUserQuestion**</summary>
**本次重构的范围以哪个为准？设计文档有24个步骤（含登录/导航/REST API/Docker/五级缓存等），但你的「主要设计思路」只列了3个重点环节。**

Options:
- **仅3个重点环节** - 在现有代码基础上，只重构：动作规划+步骤拆分、元素/意图纠偏+就绪检查、执行防假操作+提示词可改。不做登录/导航/API/Docker/五级缓存。
- **3环节+Markdown解析** - 上述3环节，外加把用例解析从YAML改为设计文档的Markdown格式（步骤①②前置条件展开）。
- **全量24步复刻** - 按设计文档完整复刻全部24个步骤（工作量极大，会重写整个项目）。

**「每个LLM环节可修改用户/系统提示词」希望用哪种方式暴露？**

Options:
- **独立提示词文件** - 每个LLM环节的系统/用户提示词放到独立的 .md/.txt 文件（如 prompts/动作规划_system.md），用户直接编辑文件即可覆盖。
- **config.yaml内联** - 在 config.yaml 中为每个环节增加可选的 system_prompt/user_prompt 字段，留空则用内置默认。
- **两者都要** - 默认提示词放独立文件，同时支持 config.yaml 覆盖。

**用例格式是否保持现有 YAML（name/url/steps）？**

Options:
- **保持YAML** - 继续用现有 natural_cases/*.yaml 格式，不引入Markdown解析。
- **改为Markdown** - 改用设计文档的Markdown标题层级格式（用例ID/前置条件/操作步骤/预期结果）。


**Answer:** 全量24步复刻, 推荐哪种" user notes: 推荐哪种, 改为Markdown
</details></tool-use>

**设计文档通笇用中文命名（如 def 执行动作列表、类 UI测试代理、动作分发器），但现有代码是英文。重构后代码标识符用哪种？**

Options:
- **英文标识符+中文注释** - 类/函数/变量用英文（如 TestAgent.run_tests, ActionPlanner），注释和文档用中文。与现有代码一致，工具链友好。（推荐）
- **中文标识符** - 严格按设计文档用中文类/函数/变量名（如 UI测试代理.运行测试）。最贴近文档但偏离 Python 社区惯例。

**全量24步工作量极大，希望怎样推进？**

Options:
- **分阶段递交** - 按文档阶段A→E：先做阶段A（能跑通一条完整用例）并验证，再逐阶段推进。每阶段可运行、可检验。（推荐）
- **一次性全部** - 一次性生成全部24步骤的完整骨架与实现，最后统一验证。


**Answer:** 英文标识符+中文注释, 分阶段递交
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./core/logger.py`

```text
1	"""结构化日志 —— 每步打印 locator/action/status/screenshot."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	from datetime import datetime
5	from pathlib import Path
6	from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Optional
7	
8	from rich.console import Console
9	from rich.markup import escape as _esc
10	
11	if TYPE_CHECKING:
12	    from .executor import StepResult
13	
14	
15	class StepLogger:
16	    def __init__(self, log_file: Optional[Path] = None) -> None:
17	        self.console = Console()
18	        self._results: list["StepResult"] = []
19	        self._log = open(log_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") if log_file else None
20	
21	    def _write(self, text: str) -> None:
22	        if self._log:
23	            ts = datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")
24	            self._log.write(f"[{ts}] {text}\n")
25	            self._log.flush()
26	
27	    # ---------- case 层 ----------
28	    def case_start(self, case_name: str, url: str, cache_hits: int, total: int) -> None:
29	        self.console.rule(f"[bold cyan]Case: {case_name}")
30	        self.console.print(f"URL    : [cyan]{url}[/cyan]")
31	        self.console.print(f"Cache  : [green]{cache_hits}/{total} HIT[/green]")
32	        self.console.print("")
33	        self._write(f"CASE START: {case_name}  URL={url}")
34	
35	    def case_end(self, total_ms: int, report_path: str) -> None:
36	        passed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "PASS")
37	        healed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "HEALED")
38	        failed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "FAIL")
39	        color = "green" if failed == 0 else "red"
40	        self.console.rule(style=color)
41	        self.console.print(f"Total: [{color}]{passed} passed[/{color}], [yellow]{healed} healed[/yellow], [red]{failed} failed[/red]   Duration: {total_ms}ms")
42	        self.console.print(f"Report: [cyan]{report_path}[/cyan]")
43	        self.console.rule(style=color)
44	        self._write(f"CASE END  pass={passed} healed={healed} fail={failed}  {total_ms}ms  report={report_path}")
45	
46	    # ---------- step 层 ----------
47	    def log_translate(self, step_no: int, step_text: str, cache_hit: bool, user_prompt: str = "", page_hint: str = "") -> None:
48	        tag = "[green]CACHE HIT[/green]" if cache_hit else "[yellow]LLM CALL[/yellow]"
49	        file_tag = "CACHE HIT" if cache_hit else "LLM CALL"
50	        self.console.print(f"[dim]>> translating step {step_no}[/dim] {tag}  [white]{step_text}[/white]")
51	        self._write(f">> Step {step_no}: {step_text} [{file_tag}]")
52	        # 打印 DOM 摘要
53	        if page_hint:
54	            self.console.print(f"[dim]   └─ DOM   :[/dim]")
55	            for line in page_hint.split("\n"):
56	                self.console.print(f"[dim]      {line}[/dim]")
57	            self._write(f"   DOM   :\n{page_hint}")
58	        # 打印用户提示词（仅文件日志）
59	        if user_prompt and not cache_hit:
60	            self._write(f"   PROMPT:\n{user_prompt}")
61	
62	    def log_step_start(self, step_no: int, raw_text: str, action: str, locator: Optional[str], value: Optional[str]) -> None:
63	        """执行前预告：action + locator + value."""
64	        target = f" → {locator}" if locator else ""
65	        val = f" value={value!r}" if value else ""
66	        self.console.print(f"  [blue]▶ Step {step_no:02d}[/blue] [{action}]{target}{val}")
67	        self._write(f"  ▶ Step {step_no}: {raw_text} | action={action} locator={locator} value={value}")
68	
69	    def log_step(self, r: "StepResult") -> None:
70	        self._results.append(r)
71	        color = {"PASS": "green", "HEALED": "yellow", "FAIL": "red"}.get(r.status, "white")
72	        mark = {"PASS": "✔", "HEALED": "✚", "FAIL": "✘"}.get(r.status, "?")
73	        self.console.print(f"[bold]{mark} Step {r.step_no:02d}[/bold] [white]{r.raw_text}[/white]")
74	        self.console.print(f"  ├─ Action  : [cyan]{r.action}[/cyan]")
75	        if r.locator_repr:
76	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Locator : [magenta]{_esc(r.locator_repr)}[/magenta]")
77	        if r.code:
78	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Code    : [yellow]{_esc(r.code)}[/yellow]")
79	        if r.resolved_html:
80	            html = r.resolved_html.replace("\n", " ")
81	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Resolved: [dim]{_esc(html)}[/dim]")
82	        heal = f" (healed after {r.heal_attempts} retries)" if r.status == "HEALED" else ""
83	        self.console.print(f"  ├─ Status  : [{color}]{r.status}[/{color}]{heal} ({r.duration_ms}ms)")
84	        if r.error:
85	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Error   : [red]{r.error}[/red]")
86	        if r.screenshot:
87	            self.console.print(f"  └─ Shot    : [dim]{r.screenshot}[/dim]")
88	        else:
89	            self.console.print(f"  └─")
90	
91	        # 文件日志
92	        loc = f" locator={r.locator_repr}" if r.locator_repr else ""
93	        self._write(f"  {mark} Step {r.step_no}: {r.raw_text} | {r.status} ({r.duration_ms}ms){loc}")
94	        if r.error:
95	            self._write(f"    Error: {r.error}")
96	
97	    @property
98	    def results(self) -> list["StepResult"]:
99	        return self._results
100	
101	    def close(self) -> None:
102	        if self._log:
103	            self._log.close()
104
```
</details></tool-use>

pydantic>=2.7.0
pyyaml>=6.0

# 复制为 .env 后填写, 二选一即可

"""生成 HTML 报告 —— 步骤列表 / 截图 / 耗时 / 状态."""
from __future__ import annotations

import html
from pathlib import Path
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from .executor import StepResult


_TEMPLATE = """<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-CN"><head><meta charset="utf-8">
<title>UI Auto Report — {case}</title>
<style>
body{{font-family:-apple-system,Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;margin:0;background:#f6f7f9;color:#222}}
header{{background:#1f2937;color:#fff;padding:20px 32px}}
header h1{{margin:0;font-size:20px}}
header .meta{{opacity:.75;font-size:13px;margin-top:6px}}
.summary{{display:flex;gap:24px;padding:16px 32px;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb}}
.summary div{{font-size:14px}}
.summary b{{font-size:20px;display:block}}
.pass b{{color:#16a34a}} .heal b{{color:#d97706}} .fail b{{color:#dc2626}}
.steps{{padding:24px 32px}}
.step{{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:8px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px}}
.step.PASS{{border-left:4px solid #16a34a}}
.step.HEALED{{border-left:4px solid #d97706}}
.step.FAIL{{border-left:4px solid #dc2626}}
.step h3{{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:15px}}
.kv{{font-size:13px;color:#444;margin:4px 0}}
```

3. Consider multiple approaches and their trade-offs
4. Use AskUserQuestion if you need to clarify the approach
5. Design a concrete implementation strategy
6. When ready, use ExitPlanMode to present your plan for approval

Remember: DO NOT write or edit any files yet. This is a read-only exploration and planning phase.
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```md
# 重构计划：UI 自动化 v3 — 按设计文档全量复刻

## Context（为什么要做）

当前项目是**单趟翻译**架构：每个步骤直接 `步骤文本 → Action(含 locator) → 执行`（`core/translator.py` 一次 LLM 调用同时干了"规划做什么"和"怎么定位元素"两件事）。

设计文档 `REPLICATION_GUIDE.md` 要求把这条单趟链路拆成多个职责清晰的 LLM 环节，核心是用户强调的 3 个重点：

1. **测试用例两段处理**：动作规划（只产出 `类型/意图/值`，不含选择器）+ 步骤拆分（复合动作拆成原子动作；仅当用例明确写"等待"时才规划 `wait`）。对应文档步骤⑥⑦。
2. **脚本生成环节做元素和意图纠偏**：执行前实时抓页面 DOM 摘要 + 页面就绪检查；**有弹窗/表单时优先取弹窗、表单的 DOM**。对应步骤⑧⑨⑩。
3. **执行防假操作**：每步执行后增加 LLM 校验（点了 ≠ 点对了）+ 带后校验重试；**每个 LLM 环节都能改用户提示词和系统提示词**。对应步骤⑫⑬ + 提示词外置。

确认的范围与约定：
- **全量 24 步复刻**，分阶段递交（A→E），每阶段可运行可验证。
- 用例格式从 YAML **改为 Markdown**（标题层级：模块 `#/##/###` → 用例 `#### 用例ID` → `##### 前置条件/操作步骤/预期结果/资源定义`）。
- 代码标识符用**英文**，注释/文档用中文。
- 提示词外置：每个 LLM 环节的 system/user 模板放到 `prompts/*.md` 独立文件（首选、可直接编辑），同时支持 `config.yaml` 覆盖。

---

## 目标架构（英文标识符，模块对应文档步骤号）

\```
ui_automation/
  run.py                       # CLI 入口 → 调 core/agent.py UITestAgent.run_tests
  config.yaml                  # 扩展：新增各 LLM 环节开关 + 提示词覆盖位
  prompts/                     # 【重点3】各 LLM 环节可编辑提示词
    precondition.system.md     # ② 前置条件展开
    case_sort.system.md        # ③ 用例排序
    action_plan.system.md      # ⑥ 动作规划
    intent_split.system.md     # ⑦ 意图拆分
    readiness.system.md        # ⑩ 步骤前就绪检查
    element_decide.system.md   # ⑨L5 元素决策
    post_check.system.md       # ⑫ 步骤后校验
    retry.system.md            # ⑬ 重试策略
    skill.md                   # ㉒ 组件库知识
    *.user.md                  # 对应 user 模板（含占位符 {dom}/{intent}/...）
  core/
    parser/                    # ① 解析器
      schema.py                #   ParsedCase: 用例编号/优先级/前置/步骤/预期/依赖/模块路径/资源
      markdown_parser.py
      xmind_parser.py
      __init__.py              #   parse_case(path) 按后缀分发
    preprocess/
      precondition.py          # ② 前置条件展开（剔登录、拆操作步骤、插到最前）
      case_sort.py             # ③ 稳定拓扑排序（最小堆，检测环则保持原序）
    session/
      login.py                 # ④ 自动登录 + 会话复用 + URL 登录页识别
      navigator.py             # ⑤ 模块导航（静态映射+动态扫描+合并）
      menu_scanner.py
      feature_selectors.py     #   静态映射字典
    planning/
      action_schema.py         # PlannedAction(type, intent, value, extras) —— 无 locator
      action_planner.py        # ⑥ 动作规划（注入 skill 系统提示词；否定断言）
      intent_splitter.py       # ⑦ 意图拆分 + 剥离重复菜单点击
    dom/
      semantic_dom.py          # ⑧ 语义DOM抽取（弹窗/表单优先 + DOM稳定等待 + iframe）
      selector_pool.py         #   选择器池
    locating/                  # ⑨ 五级降级链
      resolver.py              #   编排：缓存→记忆→规则→学习→LLM，回填
      cache.py                 #   L1 选择器缓存（30min TTL）
      memory.py                #   L2 记忆库（持久化、加减分）
      rule_engine.py           #   L3 意图规则引擎（~11 条规则）
      structure_learner.py     #   L4 页面结构学习（Jaccard>0.6）
      llm_decider.py           #   L5 元素决策解析器（大模型）
      self_heal.py             #   自愈三策略
    readiness/
      pre_check.py             # ⑩ 步骤前就绪检查 + 恢复动作 + 推进门控
    execution/
      dispatcher.py            # ⑪ 动作分发器（串五级链 + Playwright 执行）
      post_check.py            # ⑫ 步骤后校验（防假操作 + 输入锚点窗口）
      retry.py                 # ⑬ 带后校验重试（值/选择器/两者/无 + 排除列表）
      runner.py                # ⑭ 执行编排器 PlaywrightRunner.run_actions
    llm/
      adapter.py               # ⑱ LLM 适配器（复用现 llm_client + 重试 + JSON 提取 + 观测回调）
      prompt_loader.py         # 【重点3】加载 prompts/*.md + config 覆盖，渲染 user 模板
    agent.py                   # ⑮ 核心编排器 UITestAgent.run_tests
    observability.py           # ⑲ 可观测性收集器
    resources.py               # ⑳ 资源管理（上传/本地/资产）
    codegen.py                 # ㉑ Playwright 代码生成（.spec.ts）
    skill_loader.py            # ㉒ 技能加载（选择类组件留完整 HTML）
    output.py                  # ㉓ 文件管理器（输出目录结构）
    logger.py / report.py      # 复用现有
  api/                         # ⑯⑰ 服务化
    server.py                  #   FastAPI + 任务管理器 + 执行路由
    task_manager.py
    server_runner.py
    remote_agent_runner.py
    local_agent.py             #   Flask 有头代理 + 心跳
  Dockerfile                   # ㉔
\```

**关键架构变更**：`locator` 不再由规划器产出。规划器只出 `{type, intent, value}`；选择器在**执行时**由分发器经五级链动态解析。这是与现有 `Translator` 最本质的差异，也是"元素/意图纠偏"的前提。

---

## 分阶段递交

### 阶段 A — 最小可用（跑通一条完整 Markdown 用例）
目标：`run.py natural_cases/login_success.md` 能解析→登录→导航→规划→拆分→DOM抽取→(仅L5 LLM定位)→执行→出报告。

落地文件：
- `core/parser/`（schema + markdown_parser + 分发入口；xmind 留桩）
- `core/preprocess/precondition.py`（②，LLM + 正则兜底）
- `core/session/login.py` `navigator.py`（④⑤，配置驱动，先支持 localhost:4173 demo）
- `core/planning/`（⑥⑦ action_schema + planner + splitter）—— **重点1**
- `core/dom/semantic_dom.py`（⑧，移植现 `dom_snapshot.py` 并增加弹窗/表单优先）—— **重点2 部分**
- `core/locating/resolver.py` + `llm_decider.py`（⑨ 先只实现 L5）
- `core/execution/dispatcher.py` + `runner.py`（⑪⑭，移植现 `executor.py`，改为按意图运行时定位）
- `core/llm/adapter.py` + `prompt_loader.py`（⑱ + 提示词外置）—— **重点3 部分**
- `core/agent.py`（⑮）、`core/output.py`（㉓）、`run.py` 改写
- `prompts/*.md` 初版、`natural_cases/*.md`（把现有 3 个 yaml 转写为 md）、`config.yaml` 扩展
- 复用：`core/logger.py` `report.py` `llm_client.py`（被 adapter 包一层）

验证：`python run.py natural_cases/login_success.md`，浏览器自动登录并断言"登录成功"，输出 `输出/UI测试/<时间戳>/...` 报告。

### 阶段 B — 可靠性（消除假通过）—— **重点2 + 重点3 收尾**
- `core/readiness/pre_check.py`（⑩ 就绪检查 + 弹窗/表单 DOM 优先 + 必填项检测 + 恢复动作 + 推进门控）
- `core/execution/post_check.py`（⑫ 后校验，防假操作 + 输入锚点窗口）
- `core/execution/retry.py`（⑬ 带后校验重试）
- `core/locating/` 补齐 L1 缓存 / L2 记忆 / L3 规则引擎 / L4 结构学习 + `self_heal.py`
- runner 接入就绪检查/后校验/重试开关

验证：`shop_scenario.md` 全程跑通，制造一处假操作（如表单未打开就点保存）观察被后校验拦截并重试。

### 阶段 C — 智能加速（省 80% LLM 调用）
- 规则引擎全表（11 条）调优 + 缓存 TTL + 结构学习 Jaccard 调优 + 回填策略
- 验证：同一用例二次运行，统计 L1~L4 命中率，LLM 调用大幅下降。

### 阶段 D — 服务化
- `api/`（⑯ FastAPI + 任务管理器 + 执行路由；⑰ Flask 本地代理 + 心跳）+ `Dockerfile`（㉔）
- 验证：`POST /api/v1/ui-test/run` 上传 md → 轮询 status → 下载 report zip。

### 阶段 E — 增强（按需）
- `observability.py`（⑲）、`resources.py`（⑳ 上传/资产）、`codegen.py`（㉑ .spec.ts）、`skill_loader.py`+`prompts/skill.md`（㉒）
- 验证：上传类用例跑通；生成 `.spec.ts` 可读。

---

## 重点 3 落地细节（提示词可改 + 防假操作）

- `core/llm/prompt_loader.py`：`load(stage)` 先读 `prompts/{stage}.system.md` / `.user.md`，若 `config.yaml` 的 `llm.prompts.{stage}.system/user` 非空则覆盖；user 模板用 `str.format` 注入 `{dom}/{intent}/{action_type}/{value}` 等占位符。所有 LLM 环节（②③⑥⑦⑨L5⑩⑫⑬）统一经此加载。
- 每个用例输出目录保存 `使用的模型提示词.md` + `模型原始响应.txt`（㉓），方便核对提示词改动效果。
- 防假操作主链：⑩ 执行前就绪检查（弹窗/表单优先、必填项检测）→ ⑪ 分发执行 → ⑫ 后校验（实际点击目标是否与意图一致、输入值是否符合格式）→ ⑬ 失败按"值/选择器/两者/无"策略重试。

---

## 关键复用点（避免重写）
- DOM 抽取：`core/dom_snapshot.py` 的 `_SNAPSHOT_JS` / `snapshot()` / 冲突检测 → 迁入 `core/dom/semantic_dom.py`，新增弹窗(dialog)/表单(form)节点前置排序。
- Playwright 执行：`core/executor.py` 的 `_run_action` / `_assert` → 迁入 `dispatcher.py`。
- LLM 协议：`core/llm_client.py` 的 `_OpenAICompatClient` / `_extract_json` → 被 `llm/adapter.py` 复用。
- 定位解析：`core/locator_resolver.py` → 供 `dispatcher` 把选择器字符串转 Playwright Locator。
- 日志/报告：`core/logger.py` / `core/report.py` 直接复用。
- 旧 `core/translator.py` / `self_heal.py` / `cache.py` / `prompts.py` / `schema.py` 拆分迁移后移除。

## 兼容与回退
- 旧 `core/*.py` 在阶段 A 期间保留（新代码放新子包），全部迁移完成后再删除，保证每阶段可运行。
- `config.yaml` 新增字段全部带默认值，不破坏现有 `llm`/`playwright`/`runner` 段。

---

## 端到端验证
- 阶段 A：`python run.py natural_cases/login_success.md` → 浏览器登录 + 断言通过 + 生成报告目录。
- 阶段 B：`python run.py natural_cases/shop_scenario.md` → 全流程通过；人为破坏一步验证后校验拦截。
- 阶段 D：`uvicorn api.server:app` + curl 三个接口。
- 每阶段结束运行对应用例并人工查看 `输出/UI测试/<时间戳>/<用例编号>/` 下的报告、提示词、原始响应。

## 首批落地（待批准后从阶段 A 开始）
1. 新建 `core/parser/`、`core/planning/`、`core/llm/`、`core/dom/`、`core/locating/`、`core/execution/`、`core/session/`、`prompts/`、`core/agent.py`、`core/output.py`。
2. 把 3 个 yaml 用例转写为 md。
3. 改写 `run.py` + 扩展 `config.yaml`。
4. 跑通 `login_success.md` 后暂停，交付阶段 A 验证再继续 B。

```

File created successfully at: /Users/zyb_1/.zcode/plans/effervescent-weaving-swing.md
```

# 重构计划：UI 自动化 v3 — 按设计文档全量复刻

## Context（为什么要做）

当前项目是**单趟翻译**架构：每个步骤直接 `步骤文本 → Action(含 locator) → 执行`（`core/translator.py` 一次 LLM 调用同时干了"规划做什么"和"怎么定位元素"两件事）。

设计文档 `REPLICATION_GUIDE.md` 要求把这条单趟链路拆成多个职责清晰的 LLM 环节，核心是用户强调的 3 个重点：

1. **测试用例两段处理**：动作规划（只产出 `类型/意图/值`，不含选择器）+ 步骤拆分（复合动作拆成原子动作；仅当用例明确写"等待"时才规划 `wait`）。对应文档步骤⑥⑦。
2. **脚本生成环节做元素和意图纠偏**：执行前实时抓页面 DOM 摘要 + 页面就绪检查；**有弹窗/表单时优先取弹窗、表单的 DOM**。对应步骤⑧⑨⑩。
3. **执行防假操作**：每步执行后增加 LLM 校验（点了 ≠ 点对了）+ 带后校验重试；**每个 LLM 环节都能改用户提示词和系统提示词**。对应步骤⑫⑬ + 提示词外置。

确认的范围与约定：
- **全量 24 步复刻**，分阶段递交（A→E），每阶段可运行可验证。
- 用例格式从 YAML **改为 Markdown**（标题层级：模块 `#/##/###` → 用例 `#### 用例ID` → `##### 前置条件/操作步骤/预期结果/资源定义`）。
- 代码标识符用**英文**，注释/文档用中文。
- 提示词外置：每个 LLM 环节的 system/user 模板放到 `prompts/*.md` 独立文件（首选、可直接编辑），同时支持 `config.yaml` 覆盖。

```

    skill_loader.py            # ㉒ 技能加载（选择类组件留完整 HTML）
    output.py                  # ㉓ 文件管理器（输出目录结构）
    logger.py / report.py      # 复用现有
  api/                         # ⑯⑰ 服务化
    server.py                  #   FastAPI + 任务管理器 + 执行路由
    task_manager.py
    server_runner.py
    remote_agent_runner.py
    local_agent.py             #   Flask 有头代理 + 心跳
  Dockerfile                   # ㉔
```

**关键架构变更**：`locator` 不再由规划器产出。规划器只出 `{type, intent, value}`；选择器在**执行时**由分发器经五级链动态解析。这是与现有 `Translator` 最本质的差异，也是"元素/意图纠偏"的前提。

---

## 分阶段递交

### 阶段 A — 最小可用（跑通一条完整 Markdown 用例）
目标：`run.py natural_cases/login_success.md` 能解析→登录→导航→规划→拆分→DOM抽取→(仅L5 LLM定位)→执行→出报告。

落地文件：
- `core/parser/`（schema + markdown_parser + 分发入口；xmind 留桩）
- `core/preprocess/precondition.py`（②，LLM + 正则兜底）
- `core/session/login.py` `navigator.py`（④⑤，配置驱动，先支持 localhost:4173 demo）
- `core/planning/`（⑥⑦ action_schema + planner + splitter）—— **重点1**
- `core/dom/semantic_dom.py`（⑧，移植现 `dom_snapshot.py` 并增加弹窗/表单优先）—— **重点2 部分**
- `core/locating/resolver.py` + `llm_decider.py`（⑨ 先只实现 L5）
- `core/execution/dispatcher.py` + `runner.py`（⑪⑭，移植现 `executor.py`，改为按意图运行时定位）
- `core/llm/adapter.py` + `prompt_loader.py`（⑱ + 提示词外置）—— **重点3 部分**
- `core/agent.py`（⑮）、`core/output.py`（㉓）、`run.py` 改写
- `prompts/*.md` 初版、`natural_cases/*.md`（把现有 3 个 yaml 转写为 md）、`config.yaml` 扩展
- 复用：`core/logger.py` `report.py` `llm_client.py`（被 adapter 包一层）

验证：`python run.py natural_cases/login_success.md`，浏览器自动登录并断言"登录成功"，输出 `输出/UI测试/<时间戳>/...` 报告。

### 阶段 B — 可靠性（消除假通过）—— **重点2 + 重点3 收尾**
- `core/readiness/pre_check.py`（⑩ 就绪检查 + 弹窗/表单 DOM 优先 + 必填项检测 + 恢复动作 + 推进门控）
- `core/execution/post_check.py`（⑫ 后校验，防假操作 + 输入锚点窗口）
- `core/execution/retry.py`（⑬ 带后校验重试）
- `core/locating/` 补齐 L1 缓存 / L2 记忆 / L3 规则引擎 / L4 结构学习 + `self_heal.py`
- runner 接入就绪检查/后校验/重试开关

验证：`shop_scenario.md` 全程跑通，制造一处假操作（如表单未打开就点保存）观察被后校验拦截并重试。

### 阶段 C — 智能加速（省 80% LLM 调用）
- 规则引擎全表（11 条）调优 + 缓存 TTL + 结构学习 Jaccard 调优 + 回填策略
- 验证：同一用例二次运行，统计 L1~L4 命中率，LLM 调用大幅下降。

### 阶段 D — 服务化
- `api/`（⑯ FastAPI + 任务管理器 + 执行路由；⑰ Flask 本地代理 + 心跳）+ `Dockerfile`（㉔）
- 验证：`POST /api/v1/ui-test/run` 上传 md → 轮询 status → 下载 report zip。

### 阶段 E — 增强（按需）
- `observability.py`（⑲）、`resources.py`（⑳ 上传/资产）、`codegen.py`（㉑ .spec.ts）、`skill_loader.py`+`prompts/skill.md`（㉒）
- 验证：上传类用例跑通；生成 `.spec.ts` 可读。

---

## 重点 3 落地细节（提示词可改 + 防假操作）

- `core/llm/prompt_loader.py`：`load(stage)` 先读 `prompts/{stage}.system.md` / `.user.md`，若 `config.yaml` 的 `llm.prompts.{stage}.system/user` 非空则覆盖；user 模板用 `str.format` 注入 `{dom}/{intent}/{action_type}/{value}` 等占位符。所有 LLM 环节（②③⑥⑦⑨L5⑩⑫⑬）统一经此加载。
- 每个用例输出目录保存 `使用的模型提示词.md` + `模型原始响应.txt`（㉓），方便核对提示词改动效果。
- 防假操作主链：⑩ 执行前就绪检查（弹窗/表单优先、必填项检测）→ ⑪ 分发执行 → ⑫ 后校验（实际点击目标是否与意图一致、输入值是否符合格式）→ ⑬ 失败按"值/选择器/两者/无"策略重试。

---

## 关键复用点（避免重写）
- DOM 抽取：`core/dom_snapshot.py` 的 `_SNAPSHOT_JS` / `snapshot()` / 冲突检测 → 迁入 `core/dom/semantic_dom.py`，新增弹窗(dialog)/表单(form)节点前置排序。
- Playwright 执行：`core/executor.py` 的 `_run_action` / `_assert` → 迁入 `dispatcher.py`。
- LLM 协议：`core/llm_client.py` 的 `_OpenAICompatClient` / `_extract_json` → 被 `llm/adapter.py` 复用。
- 定位解析：`core/locator_resolver.py` → 供 `dispatcher` 把选择器字符串转 Playwright Locator。
- 日志/报告：`core/logger.py` / `core/report.py` 直接复用。
- 旧 `core/translator.py` / `self_heal.py` / `cache.py` / `prompts.py` / `schema.py` 拆分迁移后移除。

## 兼容与回退
- 旧 `core/*.py` 在阶段 A 期间保留（新代码放新子包），全部迁移完成后再删除，保证每阶段可运行。
- `config.yaml` 新增字段全部带默认值，不破坏现有 `llm`/`playwright`/`runner` 段。

---

## 端到端验证
- 阶段 A：`python run.py natural_cases/login_success.md` → 浏览器登录 + 断言通过 + 生成报告目录。
- 阶段 B：`python run.py natural_cases/shop_scenario.md` → 全流程通过；人为破坏一步验证后校验拦截。
- 阶段 D：`uvicorn api.server:app` + curl 三个接口。
- 每阶段结束运行对应用例并人工查看 `输出/UI测试/<时间戳>/<用例编号>/` 下的报告、提示词、原始响应。

## 首批落地（待批准后从阶段 A 开始）
1. 新建 `core/parser/`、`core/planning/`、`core/llm/`、`core/dom/`、`core/locating/`、`core/execution/`、`core/session/`、`prompts/`、`core/agent.py`、`core/output.py`。
2. 把 3 个 yaml 用例转写为 md。
3. 改写 `run.py` + 扩展 `config.yaml`。
4. 跑通 `login_success.md` 后暂停，交付阶段 A 验证再继续 B。
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""步骤① 解析器 —— 结构化用例数据结构.

字段对应设计文档输出结构 (英文标识符, 中文语义):
  case_id              用例编号
  priority             优先级
  preconditions        前置条件列表
  steps                操作步骤列表 (前置展开后会把前置步骤插到最前)
  expectations         预期结果列表
  dependencies         用例依赖 (其它用例的 case_id)
  module_path          模块路径 (逐级菜单)
  resources            资源定义 {名称: {source, filename}}
  notes                备注
  precondition_step_count  前置条件展开得到的步骤数 (步骤② 回填)
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import hashlib
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional


@dataclass
class CaseResource:
    """资源定义: 上传文件等. source ∈ 资产/上传/本地."""
    name: str
    source: str
    filename: str


@dataclass
class ParsedCase:
    case_id: str
    module_path: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    priority: str = ""
    preconditions: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    steps: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    expectations: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    dependencies: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    resources: dict[str, CaseResource] = field(default_factory=dict)
    notes: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    source_path: Optional[Path] = None
    # 步骤② 前置展开后回填: 前 N 条步骤来自前置条件解析, 必须保持顺序
    precondition_step_count: int = 0

    @property
    def name(self) -> str:
        """展示名 = 用例编号 (兼容旧日志接口)."""
        return self.case_id

    @property
    def case_hash(self) -> str:
        h = hashlib.md5()
        h.update(self.case_id.encode())
        for s in self.steps:
            h.update(s.encode())
        return h.hexdigest()[:10]

```

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""步骤① 解析器 —— Markdown 用例解析.

按标题层级提取:
  #     一级模块 → module_path[0]
  ##    二级模块 → module_path[1]
  ###   三级模块 → module_path[2]
  ####  用例ID：XXX → 新用例开始
  ##### 优先级 / 前置条件 / 操作步骤 / 预期结果 / 资源定义 / 用例依赖

列表项支持 `1. xxx` 与 `- xxx`. 没有标题时以文件名兜底作为模块路径.
资源定义从 \```yaml 块解析, source ∈ 资产/上传/本地, filename 必须存在.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import re
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional

import yaml

from .schema import CaseResource, ParsedCase

# 段标题归一: 去掉编号/空格, 映射到内部字段
_SECTION_ALIASES = {
    "优先级": "priority",
    "前置条件": "preconditions",
    "操作步骤": "steps",
    "步骤": "steps",
    "预期结果": "expectations",
    "预期": "expectations",
    "资源定义": "resources",
    "资源": "resources",
    "用例依赖": "dependencies",
    "依赖": "dependencies",
    "备注": "notes",
}

_HEADING_RE = re.compile(r"^(#{1,6})\s+(.*)$")
_LIST_ITEM_RE = re.compile(r"^\s*(?:\d+[.)]|[-*])\s+(.*)$")
_CASE_ID_RE = re.compile(r"用例\s*ID\s*[:：]\s*(.+)$")


def parse_markdown(path: str | Path) -> list[ParsedCase]:
    p = Path(path)
    text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    lines = text.splitlines()

    module_path: list[str] = []       # 当前 #/##/### 模块栈
    cases: list[ParsedCase] = []
    cur: Optional[ParsedCase] = None
    cur_section: Optional[str] = None
    in_code = False
    code_lang = ""
    code_buf: list[str] = []

    def flush_code() -> None:
        """代码块结束: 若处于资源定义段且是 yaml, 解析为资源."""
        nonlocal code_buf, code_lang
        if cur is not None and cur_section == "resources" and code_lang.lower() in ("yaml", "yml", ""):
            _parse_resource_yaml("\n".join(code_buf), cur)
        code_buf = []
        code_lang = ""

    for raw in lines:
        # 代码块边界
        fence = raw.lstrip()
        if fence.startswith("\```"):
            if not in_code:
                in_code = True
                code_lang = fence[3:].strip()
                code_buf = []
            else:
                in_code = False
                flush_code()
            continue
        if in_code:
            code_buf.append(raw)
            continue

        m = _HEADING_RE.match(raw)
        if m:
            level = len(m.group(1))
            title = m.group(2).strip()
            if level <= 3:
                # 模块层级: 截断到 level-1 再追加
                module_path = module_path[: level - 1]
                module_path.append(title)
                cur = None
                cur_section = None
            elif level == 4:
                # 新用例
                cid = _extract_case_id(title)
                cur = ParsedCase(case_id=cid, module_path=list(module_path), source_path=p)
                cases.append(cur)
                cur_section = None
            else:  # level >= 5: 段标题
                cur_section = _resolve_section(title)
                if cur is not None and cur_section == "priority":
                    # 优先级可能直接写在标题里: "##### 优先级 P0"
                    inline = _strip_section_label(title)
                    if inline:
                        cur.priority = inline
            continue

        # 普通内容行
        if cur is None or cur_section is None:
            continue
        item = _LIST_ITEM_RE.match(raw)
        content = item.group(1).strip() if item else raw.strip()
        if not content:
            continue
        _append_section(cur, cur_section, content)

    # 没有任何用例: 用文件名兜底成一个空模块 (容错)
    return cases


def _extract_case_id(title: str) -> str:
    m = _CASE_ID_RE.search(title)
    if m:
        return m.group(1).strip()
    return title.strip()


def _resolve_section(title: str) -> Optional[str]:
    label = _strip_section_label(title) if False else title
    # 取标题中的关键词 (可能形如 "优先级" 或 "优先级 P0" 或 "1. 操作步骤")
    cleaned = re.sub(r"^\d+[.)]\s*", "", title).strip()
    for key, field in _SECTION_ALIASES.items():
        if cleaned.startswith(key):
            return field
    return None


def _strip_section_label(title: str) -> str:
    cleaned = re.sub(r"^\d+[.)]\s*", "", title).strip()
    for key in _SECTION_ALIASES:
        if cleaned.startswith(key):
            return cleaned[len(key):].strip(" :：")
    return ""


def _append_section(case: ParsedCase, section: str, content: str) -> None:
    if section == "priority":
        if not case.priority:
            case.priority = content
    elif section == "preconditions":
        case.preconditions.append(content)
    elif section == "steps":
        case.steps.append(content)
    elif section == "expectations":
        case.expectations.append(content)
    elif section == "dependencies":
        case.dependencies.append(content)
    elif section == "notes":
        case.notes.append(content)
    # resources 只从 yaml 代码块解析, 忽略散行


def _parse_resource_yaml(block: str, case: ParsedCase) -> None:
    try:
        data = yaml.safe_load(block)
    except Exception:
        return
    if not isinstance(data, dict):
        return
    for name, spec in data.items():
        if not isinstance(spec, dict):
            continue
        source = str(spec.get("来源") or spec.get("source") or "").strip()
        filename = str(spec.get("文件名") or spec.get("filename") or "").strip()
        if source not in ("资产", "上传", "本地"):
            raise ValueError(f"资源 {name} 的来源必须是 资产/上传/本地, 实际: {source!r}")
        if not filename:
            raise ValueError(f"资源 {name} 缺少文件名")
        case.resources[str(name)] = CaseResource(name=str(name), source=source, filename=filename)

```

```text
File created successfully at: /Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/parser/markdown_parser.py
```
</details></tool-use>

"""步骤① 解析器统一入口.

parse_case(路径) 按后缀 .md / .xmind 自动分发, 不支持的后缀抛 ValueError.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

from .schema import CaseResource, ParsedCase


def parse_case(path: str | Path) -> list[ParsedCase]:
    p = Path(path)
    suffix = p.suffix.lower()
    if suffix in (".md", ".markdown"):
        from .markdown_parser import parse_markdown
        return parse_markdown(p)
    if suffix == ".xmind":
        from .xmind_parser import parse_xmind
        return parse_xmind(p)
    raise ValueError(f"不支持的用例后缀: {suffix} (支持 .md / .xmind)")


__all__ = ["parse_case", "ParsedCase", "CaseResource"]

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""步骤⑱ 大模型适配器 —— 所有 AI 能力的底层驱动.

封装 OpenAI 兼容接口, 提供:
  - complete_json(): 返回 LLMResult(含解析后的 dict + 原始文本 + 完整提示词)
  - complete_text(): 返回纯文本
  - 失败重试 + JSON 提取 (复用 core.llm_client._extract_json)
  - 观测回调 (on_call): 把完整提示词和原始返回交给可观测性收集器
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import time
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Any, Callable, Optional

# 复用旧实现的 JSON 提取 (字符串感知括号计数法)
from ..llm_client import _extract_json


@dataclass
class LLMResult:
    data: dict[str, Any]
    raw: str
    system: str
    user: str


# 观测回调签名: (stage, system, user, raw) -> None
ObserveFn = Callable[[str, str, str, str], None]


class LLMAdapter:
    def __init__(
        self,
        llm_cfg: dict[str, Any],
        max_retries: int = 2,
        retry_delay_s: float = 1.0,
        observe: Optional[ObserveFn] = None,
    ) -> None:
        self._cfg = llm_cfg
        self._max_retries = max_retries
        self._retry_delay = retry_delay_s
        self._observe = observe
        self._build_client()

    def _build_client(self) -> None:
        from openai import OpenAI

        provider = (self._cfg.get("provider") or "ollama").strip().lower()
        sub = self._cfg.get(provider, {}) or {}
        base_url = (sub.get("base_url") or "").rstrip("/")
        if base_url and not base_url.endswith("/v1"):
            base_url += "/v1"
        self.provider = provider
        self.model = sub.get("model", "")
        self._timeout = int(sub.get("timeout_seconds", 120))
        self._max_tokens = int(self._cfg.get("max_tokens", 2048))
        self._temperature = float(self._cfg.get("temperature", 0.0))
        self._use_response_format = provider != "ollama"
        self._client = OpenAI(
            api_key=sub.get("api_key") or "ollama",
            base_url=base_url or "http://localhost:11434/v1",
            timeout=self._timeout,
        )

    # ---------- 核心调用 ----------
    def _chat(self, system: str, user: str, examples: Optional[list[dict]], json_mode: bool) -> str:
        messages: list[dict[str, Any]] = [{"role": "system", "content": system}]
        for ex in examples or []:
            messages.append({"role": "user", "content": ex["input"]})
            messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": ex["output"]
                             if isinstance(ex["output"], str) else _dumps(ex["output"])})
        messages.append({"role": "user", "content": user})

        kwargs: dict[str, Any] = dict(
            model=self.model,
            max_tokens=self._max_tokens,
            temperature=self._temperature,
            messages=messages,
        )
        if json_mode and self._use_response_format:
            kwargs["response_format"] = {"type": "json_object"}

        last_err: Optional[Exception] = None
        for attempt in range(self._max_retries + 1):
            try:
                resp = self._client.chat.completions.create(**kwargs)
                return resp.choices[0].message.content or ""
            except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
                last_err = e
                # response_format 不被支持时降级一次
                if "response_format" in kwargs and "response_format" in str(e).lower():
                    kwargs.pop("response_format", None)
                    continue
                if attempt < self._max_retries:
                    time.sleep(self._retry_delay)
                    continue
                raise
        raise last_err  # type: ignore[misc]

    def complete_json(
        self,
        stage: str,
        system: str,
        user: str,
        examples: Optional[list[dict]] = None,
    ) -> LLMResult:
        raw = self._chat(system, user, examples, json_mode=True)
        if self._observe:
            self._observe(stage, system, user, raw)
        data = _extract_json(raw)
        return LLMResult(data=data, raw=raw, system=system, user=user)

    def complete_text(self, stage: str, system: str, user: str) -> str:
        raw = self._chat(system, user, None, json_mode=False)
        if self._observe:
            self._observe(stage, system, user, raw)
        return raw


def _dumps(obj: Any) -> str:
    import json
    return json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False)

```

File created successfully at: /Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/llm/adapter.py
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""【重点3】提示词加载器 —— 每个 LLM 环节的 system / user 提示词均可被用户修改.

优先级 (从高到低):
  1. config.yaml 的 llm.prompts.{stage}.system / user (非空时覆盖)
  2. prompts/{stage}.system.md / prompts/{stage}.user.md 文件
  3. 代码内置兜底 (传入的 default_system / default_user)

user 模板用 `{{占位符}}` 注入运行时变量 (双花括号, 避免与 JSON 示例里的单花括号冲突).
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Optional


class PromptLoader:
    def __init__(self, prompts_dir: str | Path, config_prompts: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None) -> None:
        self.dir = Path(prompts_dir)
        self.cfg = config_prompts or {}

    # ---------- system ----------
    def system(self, stage: str, default: str = "") -> str:
        override = self._cfg_value(stage, "system")
        if override:
            return override
        f = self.dir / f"{stage}.system.md"
        if f.exists():
            return f.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
        return default

    # ---------- user ----------
    def user(self, stage: str, default: str = "", **kwargs: Any) -> str:
        override = self._cfg_value(stage, "user")
        if override:
            template = override
        else:
            f = self.dir / f"{stage}.user.md"
            template = f.read_text(encoding="utf-8") if f.exists() else default
        return _render(template, kwargs)

    def load(self, stage: str, default_system: str = "", default_user: str = "", **kwargs: Any) -> tuple[str, str]:
        return self.system(stage, default_system), self.user(stage, default_user, **kwargs)

    def _cfg_value(self, stage: str, key: str) -> str:
        node = self.cfg.get(stage) or {}
        if isinstance(node, dict):
            v = node.get(key)
            if isinstance(v, str) and v.strip():
                return v
        return ""


def _render(template: str, kwargs: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
    out = template
    for k, v in kwargs.items():
        out = out.replace("{{" + k + "}}", "" if v is None else str(v))
    return out

```

```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""规划动作结构 —— 规划器只产出"做什么", 不含选择器.

与旧 Action 的本质区别: 没有 locator 字段. 选择器在执行时由五级链动态解析,
这样页面改版后选择器变了、意图不变, 也能继续工作.

type 动作类型枚举 (英文标识符, 中文意图):
  click 点击 / hover 悬停 / fill 输入 / press 按键 / goto 跳转 / wait 等待 /
  upload 上传 / assert_text 断言文本 / assert_count 断言计数 / assert_table 断言表格 / asset 资产
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Any, Optional

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

ACTION_TYPES = {
    "click", "hover", "fill", "press", "goto", "wait", "upload",
    "assert_text", "assert_count", "assert_table", "asset",
}


class PlannedAction(BaseModel):
    type: str = Field(..., description="动作类型, 见 ACTION_TYPES")
    intent: str = Field(..., description="自然语言原子意图, 如 '点击保存地址按钮'")
    value: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="输入值/等待时长/断言期望值/上传字段等")
    negate: bool = Field(False, description="否定断言: 验证页面不存在 value")
    extras: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict, description="上传字段名等附加参数")

    # 运行期填充, 不由规划器产出
    selector: Optional[str] = Field(None, exclude=True)
    intent_split: bool = Field(False, exclude=True, description="是否由意图拆分得到")
    is_recovery: bool = Field(False, exclude=True, description="是否为就绪检查的恢复动作")

    def needs_locating(self) -> bool:
        """需要定位元素的动作类型."""
        return self.type in {"click", "hover", "fill", "press", "upload", "assert_count", "assert_table"}

    def is_assert(self) -> bool:
        return self.type in {"assert_text", "assert_count", "assert_table", "asset"}

    def clone_child(self, intent: str) -> "PlannedAction":
        """拆分出的子动作: 继承 value/extras, 清除 selector, 打拆分标记."""
        return PlannedAction(
            type=self.type,
            intent=intent,
            value=self.value,
            negate=self.negate,
            extras=dict(self.extras),
            intent_split=True,
        )


def coerce_action(raw: dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[PlannedAction]:
    """把 LLM 原始 dict 容错转换为 PlannedAction; 非法则返回 None."""
    if not isinstance(raw, dict):
        return None
    t = str(raw.get("type") or raw.get("类型") or "").strip()
    intent = str(raw.get("intent") or raw.get("意图") or "").strip()
    if not t or not intent:
        return None
    # 常见别名归一
    alias = {
        "input": "fill", "type": "fill", "tap": "click", "mouseover": "hover",
        "assert": "assert_text", "assert_visible": "assert_text", "navigate": "goto",
        "key": "press", "sleep": "wait",
    }
    t = alias.get(t, t)
    if t not in ACTION_TYPES:
        return None
    value = raw.get("value")
    if value is None:
        value = raw.get("值")
    return PlannedAction(
        type=t,
        intent=intent,
        value=None if value is None else str(value),
        negate=bool(raw.get("negate") or raw.get("否定")),
        extras={k: v for k, v in (raw.get("extras") or {}).items()} if isinstance(raw.get("extras"), dict) else {},
    )

```

File created successfully at: /Users/zyb_1/Documents/code/python/ui_automation/core/planning/action_schema.py
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (zyb-claude 2026-06-08 08:06:44Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""步骤⑥ 动作规划 —— 大模型把 步骤+预期 翻译成 {类型, 意图, 值} 结构化动作.

核心规则 (见 prompts/action_plan.system.md):
  - 只输出 JSON; 每个动作只含 类型 + 意图, 禁止任何选择器
  - 每个意图只含一个原子操作
  - 先输出操作步骤动作, 再输出预期断言动作
  - "xxx成功"类预期 → 否定断言 (验证不存在 "xxx失败")
  - 仅当步骤明确要求等待/按键时才生成 wait/press
技能知识注入到系统提示词.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Optional

from ..llm import LLMAdapter, PromptLoader
from ..parser import ParsedCase
from .action_schema import PlannedAction, coerce_action

_DEFAULT_SYSTEM = """\
你是"动作规划器", 只负责规划"做什么", 不负责"怎么定位元素".

输出规则:
1. 只输出纯 JSON 对象, 形如 {"actions": [ {...}, {...} ]}, 禁止任何其他内容.
2. 每个动作只含 type 和 intent (可选 value/negate), 绝对禁止输出 CSS/XPath/选择器.
3. 每个 intent 只含一个原子操作 —— "点击A之后再点击B" 必须拆成两条.
4. 顺序: 先按顺序输出所有操作步骤对应的动作, 再按顺序输出所有预期结果对应的断言动作.
5. 导航由系统统一完成, 不要生成进入菜单/模块的导航点击动作.
6. "xxx成功" 类预期 → 改为否定断言: type=assert_text, value 取对应 "xxx失败" 文案, negate=true.
7. 输入动作: intent 要保留场景上下文 (如 "在弹窗中的收件人输入框输入张三"); value 为输入内容.
8. 上传动作 type=upload, extras.field 指定输入项字段名.
9. 不要假设具体组件库, 用语义化中文描述意图.
10. 仅当步骤明确写"等待"时才生成 type=wait; 仅当明确写"按下/回车"等才生成 type=press.

type 取值: click 点击 / hover 悬停 / fill 输入 / press 按键 / goto 跳转 / wait 等待 /
upload 上传 / assert_text 断言文本 / assert_count 断言计数 / assert_table 断言表格 / asset 资产.

断言:
- "页面包含/出现 X" → {"type":"assert_text","value":"X","negate":false}
- "页面不包含/无 X"  → {"type":"assert_text","value":"X","negate":true}
- "X 不可见/隐藏"    → {"type":"assert_text","value":"X","negate":true}
- "X 不包含 Y"       → {"type":"assert_text","intent":"在X区域内验证不包含Y","value":"Y","negate":true}
"""

_DEFAULT_USER = """\
模块路径: {{module_path}}
前 {{pre_count}} 条操作步骤由前置条件解析得到, 必须保持顺序.

操作步骤:
{{steps}}

预期结果:
{{expectations}}

请输出 {"actions": [...]} JSON."""


class ActionPlanner:
    def __init__(self, llm: LLMAdapter, prompts: PromptLoader, skill_text: str = "") -> None:
        self.llm = llm
        self.prompts = prompts
        self.skill_text = skill_text

    def generate_actions(self, case: ParsedCase) -> tuple[list[PlannedAction], str]:
        """返回 (动作列表, 模型原始响应)."""
        system_base = self.prompts.system("action_plan", _DEFAULT_SYSTEM)
        system = (self.skill_text + "\n\n" + system_base) if self.skill_text else system_base

        steps_text = "\n".join(f"{i+1}. {s}" for i, s in enumerate(case.steps)) or "(无)"
        exp_text = "\n".join(f"{i+1}. {e}" for i, e in enumerate(case.expectations)) or "(无)"
        user = self.prompts.user(
            "action_plan", _DEFAULT_USER,
            module_path=" / ".join(case.module_path),
            pre_count=case.precondition_step_count,
            steps=steps_text,
            expectations=exp_text,
        )

        result = self.llm.complete_json("action_plan", system, user)
        actions = _extract_actions(result.data)
        return actions, result.raw


def _extract_actions(data) -> list[PlannedAction]:
    raw_list = None
    if isinstance(data, dict):
        raw_list = data.get("actions") or data.get("动作列表") or data.get("动作")
        if raw_list is None and "type" in data:
            raw_list = [data]
    elif isinstance(data, list):
        raw_list = data
    out: list[PlannedAction] = []
    for item in raw_list or []:
        a = coerce_action(item)
        if a is not None:
            out.append(a)
    return out

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""步骤⑦ 意图拆分 —— 复合动作拆成原子动作 + 剥离重复菜单点击.

- 含多个顺序操作的意图 ("点击A之后再点击B") → 拆成 2+ 条子动作
- 子动作继承父的 value/extras, 清除 selector, 打 intent_split 标记
- 剥离动作列表开头与 模块路径 重复的菜单点击 (步骤⑤ 已完成导航)
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import re

from ..llm import LLMAdapter, PromptLoader
from .action_schema import PlannedAction

# 复合连接词: 命中才送 LLM 判断是否拆分, 省调用
_COMPOUND_MARKERS = ("之后再", "然后", "接着", "再点击", "再输入", "并点击", "，再", ",再", "并且")

_DEFAULT_SYSTEM = """\
你判断一条 UI 操作意图是否包含多个需要分别执行的顺序操作.
- 若包含多个顺序操作, 拆成原子步骤, 每条给出独立的 type 和 intent.
- 若只含一个操作, 原样返回一条.
只输出 JSON: {"steps": [ {"type":"click","intent":"..."}, ... ]}.
type 取值同规划器: click/hover/fill/press/goto/wait/upload/assert_text/assert_count/assert_table/asset."""

_DEFAULT_USER = """\
原始动作 type={{type}} intent={{intent}}
请输出 {"steps": [...]} JSON."""


class IntentSplitter:
    def __init__(self, llm: LLMAdapter, prompts: PromptLoader) -> None:
        self.llm = llm
        self.prompts = prompts

    def split_all(self, actions: list[PlannedAction]) -> list[PlannedAction]:
        out: list[PlannedAction] = []
        for a in actions:
            if a.intent_split or a.is_assert() or not _looks_compound(a.intent):
                out.append(a)
                continue
            children = self._split_one(a)
            out.extend(children if len(children) > 1 else [a])
        return out

    def _split_one(self, a: PlannedAction) -> list[PlannedAction]:
        system = self.prompts.system("intent_split", _DEFAULT_SYSTEM)
        user = self.prompts.user("intent_split", _DEFAULT_USER, type=a.type, intent=a.intent)
        try:
            data = self.llm.complete_json("intent_split", system, user).data
        except Exception:
            return [a]
        steps = data.get("steps") if isinstance(data, dict) else None
        if not isinstance(steps, list) or len(steps) <= 1:
            return [a]
        out: list[PlannedAction] = []
        for s in steps:
            if not isinstance(s, dict):
                continue
            intent = str(s.get("intent") or s.get("意图") or "").strip()
            if not intent:
                continue
            child = a.clone_child(intent)
            t = str(s.get("type") or s.get("类型") or "").strip()
            if t:
                child.type = t
            out.append(child)
        return out or [a]


def strip_duplicate_menu_clicks(actions: list[PlannedAction], module_path: list[str]) -> list[PlannedAction]:
    """剥离动作列表开头与 模块路径 重复的菜单点击."""
    if not module_path:
        return actions
    menu_terms = {m.strip() for m in module_path if m.strip()}
    out = list(actions)
    while out:
        a = out[0]
        if a.type == "click" and any(_contains_term(a.intent, term) for term in menu_terms):
            out.pop(0)
            continue
        break
    return out


def _looks_compound(intent: str) -> bool:
    return any(mk in intent for mk in _COMPOUND_MARKERS)


def _contains_term(intent: str, term: str) -> bool:
    # 去引号后判断菜单名是否作为点击目标出现
    cleaned = re.sub(r"[\"'“”‘’]", "", intent)
    return term in cleaned

```

```

type 取值: click 点击 / hover 悬停 / fill 输入 / press 按键 / goto 跳转 / wait 等待 /

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""步骤⑧ 语义DOM抽取 —— 给大模型一个能看懂的页面素描.

在浏览器执行 JS 遍历 DOM, 提取对 UI 自动化有意义的元素列表.
【重点2】弹窗/表单优先: 检测到弹窗(dialog)或表单(form)时, 把其内部节点排到最前,
避免被截断, 让定位/就绪检查优先看弹窗、表单内的状态.

迁移自旧 core/dom_snapshot.py, 新增:
  - in_dialog / in_form 标记
  - wait_for_dom_stable(): 变更观察器, DOM 安静 200ms 后才抽取
  - dialog_first 排序
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Any

_SNAPSHOT_JS = r"""
() => {
  const SEL = [
    'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid]',
    '[onclick]',
    '[tabindex="0"],[tabindex="-1"]',
    'label',
    'summary',
  ].join(',');
  const CONTAINER_SEL = '.el-select, .ant-select, [aria-haspopup]';
  const DIALOG_SEL = '[role=dialog], .el-dialog, .el-message-box, .ant-modal, .el-drawer';
  const FORM_SEL = 'form, .el-form, .ant-form';
  const items = [];
  const seen = new Map();

  function closestMatch(el, sel) {
    let cur = el;
    while (cur && cur !== document.body) {
      if (cur.matches && cur.matches(sel)) return true;
      cur = cur.parentElement;
    }
    return false;
  }

  function findScope(el) {
    let cur = el.parentElement;
    let firstClass = '';
    while (cur && cur !== document.body) {
      if (cur.id && !cur.id.startsWith('el-id-')) return '#' + cur.id;
      const role = cur.getAttribute('role');
      if (role && ['tabpanel','dialog','menu','listbox','navigation','region','form'].includes(role)) {
        const id = (cur.id && !cur.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? cur.id : '';
        const label = cur.getAttribute('aria-label') || cur.getAttribute('aria-labelledby') || '';
        if (id) return '#' + id;
        return `[role=${role}${label ? ' aria-label="' + label + '"' : ''}]`;
      }
      if (!firstClass && cur.className && typeof cur.className === 'string') {
        const classes = cur.className.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(c => c.length > 2);
        if (classes.length > 0) firstClass = '.' + classes.slice(0, 2).join('.');
      }
      cur = cur.parentElement;
    }
    return firstClass;
  }

  function isVisible(el) { return !!el.tagName; }
  function isInViewport(el) {
    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    const vh = window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight;
    const vw = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth;
    return rect.top >= 0 && rect.left >= 0 && rect.bottom <= vh && rect.right <= vw;
  }
  function isHidden(el) {
    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (rect.width === 0 && rect.height === 0) return true;
    const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
    if (style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return true;
    if (el.offsetParent === null && el.tagName.toLowerCase() !== 'body') return true;
    return false;
  }

  document.querySelectorAll(SEL).forEach(el => {
    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
    const item = {
      tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
      name: el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('name') || '',
      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
      _id: el.id || '',
      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
      text: (el.innerText || el.value || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
      placeholder: el.getAttribute('placeholder') || '',
      type: el.getAttribute('type') || '',
      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
      scope: findScope(el),
      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
      hidden: isHidden(el),
      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL),
      in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
    };
    const key = JSON.stringify({
      tag: item.tag, role: item.role, placeholder: item.placeholder,
      text: item.text, scope: item.scope, id: item.id,
    });
    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
    if (count >= 3) return;
    seen.set(key, count + 1);
    item._idx = count;
    items.push(item);
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(CONTAINER_SEL).forEach(el => {
    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
    let innerId = '';
    const innerInput = el.querySelector('input');
    if (innerInput) innerId = innerInput.id || '';
    const item = {
      tag: 'container',
      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
      name: '',
      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
      _id: el.id || '',
      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
      text: (el.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
      placeholder: '', type: '',
      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
      scope: findScope(el),
      inner_id: innerId,
      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
      hidden: isHidden(el),
      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL),
      in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
    };
    const key = 'container:' + JSON.stringify({tag: 'container', text: item.text, scope: item.scope});
    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
    if (count >= 3) return;
    seen.set(key, count + 1);
    item._idx = count;
    items.push(item);
  });

  const hasDialog = document.querySelector(DIALOG_SEL) !== null;
  return { items: items, has_dialog: hasDialog };
}
"""

_DOM_STABLE_JS = r"""
(quietMs) => new Promise((resolve) => {
  let timer = null;
  const obs = new MutationObserver(() => {
    if (timer) clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(done, quietMs);
  });
  function done() { obs.disconnect(); resolve(true); }
  obs.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true, attributes: true });
  timer = setTimeout(done, quietMs);
})
"""


def wait_for_dom_stable(page: Any, quiet_ms: int = 200, timeout_ms: int = 3000) -> None:
    """注入变更观察器, DOM 安静 quiet_ms 后返回; 超时则放弃等待."""
    try:
        page.evaluate(f"(q) => Promise.race([{_DOM_STABLE_JS}(q), new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,{timeout_ms}))])", quiet_ms)
    except Exception:
        pass


def extract_semantic_dom(page: Any, limit: int = 80, dialog_first: bool = True, stable: bool = True) -> str:
    """返回紧凑文本. 有弹窗/表单时把其内部元素排到最前 (重点2)."""
    if stable:
        wait_for_dom_stable(page)
    try:
        payload = page.evaluate(_SNAPSHOT_JS) or {}
    except Exception:
        return ""
    items = payload.get("items") or []
    has_dialog = payload.get("has_dialog", False)

    if dialog_first:
        items = _reorder_dialog_form_first(items, has_dialog)

    return _render(items, limit)


def _reorder_dialog_form_first(items: list[dict], has_dialog: bool) -> list[dict]:
    """弹窗 > 表单 > 其它. 有弹窗时只保留弹窗优先级, 避免背景页干扰排序."""
    def rank(it: dict) -> int:
        if it.get("in_dialog"):
            return 0
        if it.get("in_form"):
            return 1
        return 2
    return sorted(items, key=rank)


def _render(items: list[dict], limit: int) -> str:
    lines: list[str] = []
    dup_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
    for it in items:
        k = _dup_key(it)
        dup_counts[k] = dup_counts.get(k, 0) + 1
    dups = {k: v for k, v in dup_counts.items() if v > 1}
    substr_conflicts = _find_substring_conflicts(items)

    if dups or substr_conflicts:
        lines.append("⚠ 重复/冲突元素 (使用这些定位器会命中多个元素, 必须加 scope/nth/css 前缀来区分):")
        for k, cnt in dups.items():
            lines.append(f"  ×{cnt}  {k}")
        for conflict in substr_conflicts:
            lines.append(f"  ⚡ 子串冲突: {conflict}")
        lines.append("")

    for it in items[:limit]:
        if it.get("tag") == "container":
            parts = ["container(.el-select)"]
            if it.get("haspopup"):
                parts.append(f"haspopup={it['haspopup']}")
            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
        else:
            parts = [f"<{it['tag']}"]
            if it.get("id"):
                parts.append(f'id="{it["id"]}"')
            for k in ("role", "name", "testid", "type", "placeholder", "haspopup"):
                v = it.get(k)
                if v:
                    parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
            idx = it.get("_idx", 0)
            if idx > 0:
                parts.append(f"#{idx}")
            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
        text = it.get("text") or ""
        suffix_parts = []
        if it.get("in_dialog"):
            suffix_parts.append("[弹窗]")
        elif it.get("in_form"):
            suffix_parts.append("[表单]")
        if it.get("scope"):
            suffix_parts.append(f"[scope={it['scope']}]")
        if it.get("hidden", False):
            suffix_parts.append("[hidden]")
        elif not it.get("in_viewport", True):
            suffix_parts.append("[off-screen]")
        suffix = " " + " ".join(suffix_parts) if suffix_parts else ""
        lines.append(f"{head} {text}{suffix}".rstrip())
    return "\n".join(lines)


def _dup_key(it: dict) -> str:
    if it.get("tag") == "container":
        return f"container text={it.get('text','')}"
    parts = []
    for k in ("tag", "role", "name", "type", "placeholder"):
        v = it.get(k)
        if v:
            parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
    txt = it.get("text") or ""
    if txt:
        parts.append(f'text="{txt}"')
    return " ".join(parts)


def _find_substring_conflicts(items: list) -> list[str]:
    conflicts = []
    seen_pairs = set()

    def collect_values(field: str):
        return [(it.get(field) or "", it) for it in items if (it.get(field) or "") and len(it.get(field) or "") >= 2]

    for field in ("placeholder", "name", "text"):
        values = collect_values(field)
        for i, (v1, _it1) in enumerate(values):
            for v2, _it2 in values[i + 1:]:
                if v1 == v2:
                    continue
                if v1 in v2 or v2 in v1:
                    short, long = (v1, v2) if len(v1) < len(v2) else (v2, v1)
                    pair_key = f"{field}:{short}|{long}"
                    if pair_key in seen_pairs:
                        continue
                    seen_pairs.add(pair_key)
                    conflicts.append(f'{field}="{short}" 会命中 {field}="{long}"')
    return conflicts

```

```python
"""步骤⑨ 第5级 元素决策解析器 —— 大模型全量解析.

输入: 带编号的语义DOM + 意图 + 动作类型 → 大模型返回节点编号 → 映射成选择器.
最慢但最灵活. 成功后由 resolver 回填 1~4 级 (阶段B).
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Optional

from ..dom import DomIndex
from ..llm import LLMAdapter, PromptLoader

_DEFAULT_SYSTEM = """\
你是"元素决策器". 给你一个带编号的页面元素列表和一个操作意图, 你要选出最匹配的元素编号.

规则:
- 输入类(fill)动作: 只能选可编辑的输入框/文本域 (<input>/<textarea>), 排除只读和下拉容器.
- 点击类(click)动作: 选按钮/链接/可点击项.
- 上传(upload): 只选文件输入框.
- 综合看 文本、placeholder、name、role、type 后再决策, 不要只看单一维度.
- 有 [弹窗]/[表单] 标记的元素优先 (当前操作多发生在弹窗、表单内).
- 禁止编造编号, 必须返回列表中真实存在的编号.
只输出 JSON: {"index": 数字}. 找不到则 {"index": -1}."""

_DEFAULT_USER = """\
动作类型: {{action_type}}
操作意图: {{intent}}

页面元素 (编号从 0 开始):
{{dom}}

请输出 {"index": 数字} JSON."""


class LLMElementDecider:
    def __init__(self, llm: LLMAdapter, prompts: PromptLoader) -> None:
        self.llm = llm
        self.prompts = prompts

    def decide(self, dom: DomIndex, intent: str, action_type: str) -> Optional[dict]:
        """返回选中的 selector 信息 {selector, nth, in_dialog}; 找不到返回 None."""
        if len(dom) == 0:
            return None
        system = self.prompts.system("element_decide", _DEFAULT_SYSTEM)
        user = self.prompts.user(
            "element_decide", _DEFAULT_USER,
            action_type=action_type, intent=intent, dom=dom.numbered_text,
        )
        try:
            data = self.llm.complete_json("element_decide", system, user).data
        except Exception:
            return None
        idx = _as_int(data.get("index") if isinstance(data, dict) else None)
        if idx is None or idx < 0 or idx >= len(dom.selectors):
            return None
        return dom.selectors[idx]


def _as_int(v) -> Optional[int]:
    try:
        return int(v)
    except (TypeError, ValueError):
        return None

```

```

```python
"""步骤⑨ 元素定位五级降级链编排器.

阶段A: 只实现第5级 (大模型全量解析).
阶段B: 补齐 L1缓存 / L2记忆 / L3规则引擎 / L4结构学习 + 命中后回填.

resolve(page, intent, action_type) → SelectorInfo | None
SelectorInfo = {selector: str, nth: int, in_dialog: bool}
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Any, Optional

from ..dom import extract_dom_index
from .llm_decider import LLMElementDecider


class LocatorResolver:
    def __init__(self, decider: LLMElementDecider) -> None:
        self.decider = decider
        # 阶段B 注入: self.cache / self.memory / self.rule_engine / self.learner

    def resolve(self, page: Any, intent: str, action_type: str, dom_limit: int = 80) -> Optional[dict]:
        # —— 阶段B 将在此依次插入 L1~L4, 命中即返回 ——
        # L5 大模型全量解析
        dom = extract_dom_index(page, limit=dom_limit, dialog_first=True)
        info = self.decider.decide(dom, intent, action_type)
        # 命中后回填 (阶段B): self._backfill(...)
        return info

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>

```python
"""步骤⑪ 动作分发器 —— 统一执行入口.

dispatch(action) → (成功, 消息). 对需定位的动作先走五级链解析选择器, 再用 Playwright 执行.
消息里带"实际操作目标"(解析到的元素 HTML 片段), 供步骤⑫ 后校验判断是否点对.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import re
from typing import Any, Optional

from ..locating import LocatorResolver
from ..planning import PlannedAction


class ActionDispatcher:
    def __init__(self, page: Any, resolver: LocatorResolver, default_timeout_ms: int = 10000) -> None:
        self.page = page
        self.resolver = resolver
        self.default_timeout = default_timeout_ms

    def set_page(self, page: Any) -> None:
        """新标签页切换后更新页面对象."""
        self.page = page

    def dispatch(self, action: PlannedAction, case_id: str = "") -> tuple[bool, str]:
        t = action.type
        try:
            if t == "goto":
                self.page.goto(action.value or "", timeout=self.default_timeout)
                return True, f"跳转到 {action.value}"
            if t == "wait":
                return self._wait(action)
            if t in ("assert_text", "asset"):
                return self._assert_text(action)

            if action.needs_locating():
                loc, target_html = self._resolve(action)
                if loc is None:
                    return False, f"找不到元素: {action.intent}"
                return self._run_located(t, loc, action, target_html)

            return False, f"未支持的动作类型: {t}"
        except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
            return False, f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}"

    # ---------- 定位 ----------
    def _resolve(self, action: PlannedAction):
        info = self.resolver.resolve(self.page, action.intent, action.type)
        if not info:
            return None, None
        loc = self.page.locator(info["selector"])
        nth = info.get("nth", 0) or 0
        if nth:
            loc = loc.nth(nth)
        else:
            loc = loc.first
        action.selector = info["selector"]
        target_html = None
        try:
            target_html = loc.evaluate("el => el.outerHTML.slice(0, 200)")
        except Exception:
            target_html = None
        return loc, target_html

    # ---------- 已定位动作执行 ----------
    def _run_located(self, t: str, loc, action: PlannedAction, target_html: Optional[str]) -> tuple[bool, str]:
        timeout = self.default_timeout
        suffix = f" | 实际目标: {target_html}" if target_html else ""
        if t == "click":
            try:
                role = loc.evaluate("el => el.getAttribute('role')")
            except Exception:
                role = None
            if role == "combobox":
                loc.click(timeout=timeout, force=True)
            else:
                loc.click(timeout=timeout)
            self._maybe_switch_page()
            return True, f"点击 {action.intent}{suffix}"
        if t == "hover":
            loc.hover(timeout=timeout)
            return True, f"悬停 {action.intent}{suffix}"
        if t == "fill":
            loc.fill(action.value or "", timeout=timeout)
            return True, f"输入 {action.value!r}{suffix}"
        if t == "press":
            loc.press(action.value or "Enter", timeout=timeout)
            return True, f"按键 {action.value}{suffix}"
        if t == "upload":
            loc.set_input_files(action.value or "", timeout=timeout)
            return True, f"上传 {action.value}{suffix}"
        if t == "assert_count":
            expected = int(action.value or 0)
            actual = loc.count()
            return (actual == expected), f"计数 期望{expected} 实际{actual}"
        return False, f"未支持的已定位动作: {t}"

    def _maybe_switch_page(self) -> None:
        """点击后若打开了新标签页, 切换页面对象."""
        try:
            ctx = self.page.context
            pages = ctx.pages
            if pages and pages[-1] is not self.page:
                self.page = pages[-1]
                self.page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=self.default_timeout)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ---------- 等待 ----------
    def _wait(self, action: PlannedAction) -> tuple[bool, str]:
        val = (action.value or "").strip()
        num = _as_duration_ms(val)
        if num is not None:
            self.page.wait_for_timeout(num)
            return True, f"等待 {num}ms"
        # 文本等待
        text = val or action.intent
        try:
            self.page.wait_for_function(
                "t => document.body && document.body.innerText.includes(t)",
                arg=text, timeout=self.default_timeout,
            )
            return True, f"等待文本出现 {text!r}"
        except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
            return False, f"等待文本超时 {text!r}: {e}"

    # ---------- 文本断言 (含否定断言) ----------
    def _assert_text(self, action: PlannedAction) -> tuple[bool, str]:
        target = (action.value or action.intent or "").strip()
        if not target:
            return False, "断言缺少目标文本"
        try:
            body_text = self.page.inner_text("body")
        except Exception:
            body_text = self.page.content()
        present = target in body_text
        if action.negate:
            return (not present), (f"否定断言: 页面{'仍包含' if present else '不包含'} {target!r}")
        return present, (f"断言: 页面{'包含' if present else '不包含'} {target!r}")


def _as_duration_ms(val: str) -> Optional[int]:
    """'2000' / '2秒' / '2s' / '500ms' → 毫秒; 非时长返回 None."""
    if not val:
        return None
    m = re.fullmatch(r"\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*(ms|毫秒|s|秒|)?\s*", val)
    if not m:
        return None
    n = float(m.group(1))
    unit = m.group(2) or ""
    if unit in ("ms", "毫秒"):
        return int(n)
    if unit in ("s", "秒", ""):
        # 纯数字默认按秒? 设计文档时长模式; >100 视为毫秒, 否则秒
        return int(n * 1000) if (unit or n <= 60) else int(n)
    return int(n)

```

```
</details></tool-use>

 `./core/report.py`

```text
30	.kv{{font-size:13px;color:#444;margin:4px 0}}
31	.kv code{{background:#f3f4f6;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px}}
32	.err{{color:#dc2626;font-family:monospace;font-size:12px;white-space:pre-wrap;background:#fef2f2;padding:8px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:8px}}
33	.shot{{margin-top:10px}}
34	.shot img{{max-width:100%;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:4px}}
35	.badge{{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600}}
36	.badge.PASS{{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d}}
37	.badge.HEALED{{background:#fef3c7;color:#a16207}}
38	.badge.FAIL{{background:#fee2e2;color:#b91c1c}}
39	</style></head><body>
40	<header>
41	  <h1>UI Auto Report</h1>
42	  <div class="meta">Case: <b>{case}</b> &nbsp;|&nbsp; URL: {url} &nbsp;|&nbsp; Duration: {duration}ms</div>
43	</header>
44	<div class="summary">
45	  <div class="pass"><b>{passed}</b>Passed</div>
46	  <div class="heal"><b>{healed}</b>Healed</div>
47	  <div class="fail"><b>{failed}</b>Failed</div>
48	  <div><b>{total}</b>Total</div>
49	</div>
50	<div class="steps">
51	{steps_html}
52	</div>
53	</body></html>
54	"""
55	
56	
57	def _step_html(r: "StepResult", report_root: Path) -> str:
58	    err_html = f'<div class="err">{html.escape(r.error)}</div>' if r.error else ""
59	    shot_html = ""
60	    if r.screenshot:
61	        try:
62	            rel = Path(r.screenshot).relative_to(report_root)
63	        except ValueError:
64	            rel = Path(r.screenshot).name
65	        shot_html = f'<div class="shot"><img src="{rel}" alt="screenshot"/></div>'
66	    heal_tag = f' (healed×{r.heal_attempts})' if r.status == "HEALED" else ""
67	    return f"""<div class="step {r.status}">
68	  <h3>Step {r.step_no:02d} · <span class="badge {r.status}">{r.status}{heal_tag}</span> · {html.escape(r.raw_text)}</h3>
69	  <div class="kv">Action: <code>{html.escape(r.action)}</code></div>
70	  <div class="kv">Locator: <code>{html.escape(r.locator_repr or '-')}</code></div>
71	  <div class="kv">Code: <code>{html.escape(r.code or '-')}</code></div>
72	  <div class="kv">Resolved: <code>{html.escape((r.resolved_html or '-')[:200])}</code></div>
73	  <div class="kv">Duration: {r.duration_ms}ms</div>
74	  {err_html}
75	  {shot_html}
76	</div>"""
77	
78	
79	def render_report(
80	    case_name: str,
81	    url: str,
82	    duration_ms: int,
83	    results: list["StepResult"],
84	    out_dir: Path,
85	) -> Path:
86	    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
87	    passed = sum(1 for r in results if r.status == "PASS")
88	    healed = sum(1 for r in results if r.status == "HEALED")
89	    failed = sum(1 for r in results if r.status == "FAIL")
90	    steps_html = "\n".join(_step_html(r, out_dir) for r in results)
91	    html_text = _TEMPLATE.format(
92	        case=html.escape(case_name),
93	        url=html.escape(url),
94	        duration=duration_ms,
95	        passed=passed,
96	        healed=healed,
97	        failed=failed,
98	        total=len(results),
99	        steps_html=steps_html,
100	    )
101	    path = out_dir / "index.html"
102	    path.write_text(html_text, encoding="utf-8")
```
</details></tool-use>
